mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate applied to corporate earnings, compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample accuracy drops below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand growth, driving corporate revenue expectations higher and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and RSAFS fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a Rank IC above 0.05, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the index of industrial production during a late-cycle expansion indicates capacity constraints and supply-side bottlenecks, forcing equity valuations down over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative INDPRO trends during late-cycle phases do not precede negative 20-day SPX returns, with out-of-sample hit rate falling below 40%.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index levels erode real purchasing power and prompt expectations of tighter monetary policy, generating immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: Positive CPIAUCSL month-over-month changes fail to predict negative 5-day SPX returns, with Rank IC consistently below 0.02 across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Monthly nonfarm payrolls additions exceeding 200,000 confirm robust economic momentum, boosting corporate earnings forecasts and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Payrolls above 200k do not precede positive 60-day SPX returns, with out-of-sample accuracy dropping below 45% or Rank IC remaining negative.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in housing starts and retail sales signal synchronized consumer confidence and durable goods demand, lifting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint positive movement of HOUST and RSAFS fails to generate positive 20-day SPX returns, with interaction effect Rank IC below 0.03 in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: When inflation outpaces the federal funds rate during a tightening cycle, real rates turn negative and market volatility spikes, causing immediate negative S&P 500 returns within one week.
failure_condition: Negative real rate environments during tightening cycles do not precede negative 5-day SPX returns, with out-of-sample hit rate exceeding 55%.
